description: Document structure template for engage-exocortex exploration proposal generation (Step 5)

sections.heading: ## Context Sources
sections.content: Loaded skills, codebase analysis findings, tech stack detected. Omit this section entirely when Step 0 did not run.

sections.heading: ## Signal Analysis
sections.content: Matched signals with weights, loaded paradigms/structures/strategies with IDs and scores.

subsections.heading: ### Brief
subsections.content: The filled brief sent to the subagent (slot values, constraints).

subsections.heading: ### Report
subsections.content: Full structured report: core idea, walkthrough, complexity analysis, edge cases, implementation considerations, strengths, weaknesses, fit score.

subsections.heading: ### Scoring Matrix
subsections.content: Table of dimension scores per path (always-relevant + conditionally-relevant dimensions).

subsections.heading: ### Validation Notes
subsections.content: Errors found in subagent reasoning, complexity corrections, claims that don't hold up.

subsections.heading: ### Hybridization Analysis
subsections.content: Cross-path combination opportunities — can the best parts of two approaches be merged?

sections.heading: ## Recommendation
sections.content: Final recommendation with rationale and implementation sketch.

sections.heading: ## Rejected Paths
sections.content: Paths considered during signal matching but not selected. Each entry: path name, paradigm/structure/strategy, reason for rejection (e.g., too similar to selected path, low signal match score).
